prompt: Add real-time notifications when someone replies in the community.
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Inbox vs toast choice
nodes.details: Prefer inbox/quiet badge over interrupting toasts — reply feedback without hijacking attention.

nodes.label: Mute and quiet hours
nodes.details: Interaction model includes mute/thread mute so she can protect sacred silence.

nodes.label: Felt-answered state
nodes.details: Success state when someone replies should feel received — calm, personal, not gamified.

nodes.label: Engagement noise risk
nodes.details: Default-on noisy alerts violate decided notification intensity.
nodes.strategicAnswer: Prefer quiet belonging over engagement spam.

nodes.label: Accessible alert copy
nodes.details: Notification copy and focus order stay accessible; no shame urgency language.
